hero.title: Kuveta lwati
hero.lead: I-IATF isebenta emphakatsini. tincumo temklamo, kugucuka kwekhodi, kugucugucuka kwekuphatsa, kanye netindleko tekusebenta kubhalwa etindzaweni temphakatsi.

items: Tincumo temklamo. Tincumo letimayelana nekwemukelwa, kugcinwa kwemiculu, kanye nekuniketwa kabusha kwemisebenti tibhaliswa njengetindzaba nobe kukhululwa kuloluhlelo lolutsite lolutsintsekako, bese tihlanganiswa kulelirekhodi lelisemtsetfweni. luhlelo lwekubhalisaNgiyabonga .

Cela emarekhodi. Emarekhodi esicelo sawonkhewonkhe agcinwa enhlanganweni ye-IATF GitHub, kulewebhusayithi, nobe kokubili. Emarekhodi angahlanganisa, ahlele, nobe ahlele kabusha sicelo sekucala kute sidzingo sekufinyeleleka singabuyeketwa ngaphandle kwekuveta umniningwano longadzingeki wemuntfu. Tincumo tekungevani tiyahlanganiswa emarekhodini esive uma tiphazamisa iphrojekthi nobe sincumo sekuphatsa. Emarekhodhi esicelo akafakwa eluhlwini lwenjini yekusesha lapho kusebenta kahle khona.
Emakhodi ayashintja. Tonkhe tingucuko tekhodi tivumelekile kulolucwebu loluhambisanako. Buka i-IATF Inhlangano yeGitHubNgiyabonga .
Kuntjintja kwekuphatsa. Kuvusetelwa kwelikhasi lekulawula kulandzelwe njengekucinisekiswa i-iatf-website Kubuka i-repository. umlandvo wekubhalisa ku-GitHub.
Tindleko tekusebenta. I-IATF igcina tindleko tekusebenta tiphansi bese ibhala phansi tindleko letigucukako tetakhiwonchanti temphakatsi.

Emarekhodi lamayelana nekusebentisana. Emaphuzu lavela kunoma nguluphi luhlolo loluhlanganisiwe nobe sincumo lesiphilako ku-GitHub Tinkhulumiswano ku-repository lefanele buka Kucocisana ngekulandzela i-iatf-website indzawo yekugcina imiculu.

paragraphs: I-IATF igcina sakhiwonchanti sawonkhe muntfu sincane ngemabomu. Kusukela nga 2022, tindleko letinkhulu tekusebenta lebetivame kuba ngemagama etindzawo.
Leli rekhodi akusilo libhuku letimali lelihloliwe.Lilibhuku leliphatselene netindleko tekusebenta kwetakhiwonchanti letisetjentiselwa kugcina i-IATF isebenta ku-inthanethi.
operatingCosts.footnote: Emakheli ebantfu, imininingwane yekukhokha, kanye nemininingwane lengadzingeki ye-akhawunti ayisiyo incenye yemarekhodi esive.

items.label: Emaphuzu
items.value: I-domain ibiyelwa yi-mugiwarafx. i-hosting isebentisa i-free-tier noma i-low-cost infrastructure nge-Cloudflare. iatf.cc umkhakha.

items.label: Emaphuzu
items.value: Tindleko te-domain letibhadalwa yi-mugiwarafx. i-hosting isebentisa luhlaka lolukhululekile nobe lolubita kancane nge-Vercel.

items.label: Tindleko
items.value: Emarandi lalishumi nakune nemashumi lasikhombisa nesitfupha

items.label: Emaphuzu
items.value: Tindleko te-domain letibhadalwa yi-mugiwarafx. i-hosting isebentisa luhlaka lolukhululekile nobe lolubita kancane ngekusebentisa i-GitHub Pages.

paragraphs: Lokunye kwatiswa kugcinwa ngaphandle kwemiculu yemphakatsi ngenhloso:
items: Tincwadzi tangasese letisetjentiselwa kucacisa sicelo ngaphambi kwekutsi semukelwe, sencatjelwe nobe sifinyetiwe.
Emakheli langasese, tinombolo telucingo kanye nemininingwane lengadzingeki.
Nobe ngabe yini lengakhomba umuntfu longumsebentisi wetheknoloji yekusita ngaphandle kwemvumo yakhe.
Tinkhulumo te-Raw Discord, ngaphandle nangabe umlayeto lotsite ususwa ngemabomu uye kulenye irekhodi lemklamo levulekile.

header.title: Kwenganyelwa kwemitfombolusito yincwadzi yemitsetfo ngemuva kwalemiculu

paragraphs: Nangabe ufuna kucondza kutsi imiklamo yemukelwa njani, igcinwa njani nobe yabelwe lomunye umuntfu, fundza likhasi le-Governance.
